hero.title: Transform Your Company's Commute
hero.subtitle: The trusted corporate carpooling platform that reduces costs, cuts emissions, and creates happier employees—all while simplifying facility management.

stats.title: Proven Results for Organizations Like Yours

features.title: Everything You Need to Build a Thriving Carpool Community
features.subtitle: Our platform makes it effortless for employees to share rides while giving you the tools to track impact and measure ROI.

parkingCosts.title: Reduce Parking Costs
parkingCosts.description: Organizations report parking savings of up to 30% shortly after launching a carpooling platform, aligning with reduced traffic and emissions. Studies show carpooling can reduce fleet size by 25% in urban areas.

sustainability.title: Meet Sustainability Goals
sustainability.description: Carpooling can lower carbon emissions by 11–22% depending on participation, with every shared ride making a measurable climate impact. Event-based carpooling programs have saved over 10,000 km of car travel per event.

satisfaction.title: Boost Employee Satisfaction
satisfaction.description: Research shows that over 80% of carpoolers feel less commute stress and more workplace engagement, as shared rides foster community connections and reduce daily transportation hassles.

transportation.title: Save on Transportation
transportation.description: Pooling rides actively cuts fuel expenses and vehicle wear, with companies reporting reduced absenteeism and turnover. The carpool-as-a-service market is growing 10.6% annually through 2034.

scheduling.title: Smart Scheduling
scheduling.description: Automated ride matching and recurring scheduling ensure maximum occupancy, fewer empty seats, and daily reliability. Pptimize efficiency and reduce total travel distance by selecting the most suitable route.

communication.title: Seamless Communication
communication.description: Real-time notifications and calendar sync keep every participant informed, making complex multi-shift carpooling smooth for everyone. Email or phone colleagues directly to reduce coordination friction.

step1.title: Personalised deployement
step1.description: Set up your branded carpooling platform with our personal approach.

step2.title: Employees Connect
step2.description: Your team creates profiles, offers rides, and finds matches with colleagues on similar routes.

step3.title: Track & Optimize
step3.description: Monitor usage, measure environmental impact, and export data for sustainability reporting.

enterprise.title: Large Enterprises
enterprise.description: Reduce parking infrastructure costs and meet corporate sustainability targets with measurable emissions reductions.

tech.title: Tech Companies
tech.description: Offer a modern employee benefit that attracts and retains top talent while supporting work-life balance.

healthcare.title: Healthcare Facilities
healthcare.description: Help shift workers coordinate rides across different schedules and locations, reducing staff transportation stress.

manufacturing.title: Manufacturing
manufacturing.description: Connect employees across multiple shifts in industrial areas with limited transit options, improving retention.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Company's Commute?
cta.subtitle: Join forward-thinking organizations that are reducing costs, cutting emissions, and creating happier employees with corporate carpooling.
cta.disclaimer: No credit card required • Free trial available • Customization options

references.title: Sources & Research
references.note: All statistics based on peer-reviewed research and industry studies
sources: International Transport Forum (ITF) - Global carpooling emissions data
Nature Journal 2024 - Urban carpooling efficiency study
ScienceDirect - Carbon savings in ride-pooling research
